title: Microsoft Agent Governance Toolkit — first OSS framework covering all 10 OWASP Agentic risks
excerpt: MIT-licensed. Addresses all 10 OWASP agentic risks. Includes SLSA-compatible build provenance, cryptographic chain from source to artifact, Dependabot scanning, pinned dependencies with cryptographic hashes, Ed25519 signing + manifest verification. MCP Security Gateway addresses tool poisoning, typosquatting, hidden instructions. Trust scoring 0-1000; four-tier execution rings.
